# The Review Dash — Submission

## Summary
<!-- What did you build? One or two sentences. -->

## What's included
- [ ] Fetches reviews and stores them in PostgreSQL (with deduplication)
- [ ] Own REST API exposing the data
- [ ] Dashboard shows the latest 20 reviews, newest first
- [ ] Fetch/store is separated from display (dashboard reads via the API)
- [ ] Handles messy upstream realities (slow / rate-limited / inconsistent / failing)
- [ ] Runs from a clean clone per the README
- [ ] `SUBMISSION.md` completed
